description: Style Noteshree kurta for the authentic Desi vibe. Get your summer prints right with this lovely printed piece. Pair it with airy patialas to nail that Punjabi look, or style it with stretchy leggings for all day comfort. Product DetailsRed printed kurta with green trims, has a round neck with a split neckline, embroidery and paneling on the placket, three quarter sleeves with paneling at the cuffs and side slitsMaterial and CareBlended fabricHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
